description: Expected findings for the pypi-malicious fixture. 'ctx==0.2.2' is the version range the malicious 2022 release fell into; see vulnerabilities/supply-chain/malicious-packages/pypi.json for the upstream advisory. requests==2.31.0 is also pinned vulnerable to GHSA-j8r2-6x86-q33q (CVE-2023-32681, Proxy-Authorization header leak) per the local OSV cache. Known residual FP: requests is also surfaced as a typosquat because the typosquat-db contains 'request' (Levenshtein 1 from 'requests'); the typosquat detector does not exclude the canonical target, so the legitimate 'requests' install gets flagged. Tracked but not expected.
